name: XiaoJun
short_description: This is a dark, immersive narrative RPG following a boy’s turbulent life. From rural hardship to urban survival, he learns that fate must be seized. Players will experience a gripping journey through childhood struggles, betrayal, revenge, and the search for identity.
detailed_description:
"Xiao Jun" is a narrative-driven RPG that tells the turbulent life story of a boy determined to take control of his own fate.

From a harsh childhood in the countryside to the unforgiving rules of survival in the city, players will experience a powerful journey filled with betrayal, revenge, and deep self-discovery.

  • Deep, emotionally-driven storyline
    Experience Xiao Jun's life from a troubled childhood to a dark, complex adulthood filled with loss, loyalty, and revenge.

  • 🌆 Multiple chapters spanning rural and urban environments
    From dusty village paths to neon-lit alleyways, explore evolving settings that reflect Xiao Jun’s personal transformation.

  • 🎮 Turn-based combat with strategic elements
    Face bullies, gangsters, and inner demons through a combat system that blends street fights with psychological tension.

  • 👫 Character relationships and betrayal arcs
    Build friendships—or destroy them. Trust is fragile, and betrayal cuts deep.

  • 🎨 Pixel-art visuals with cinematic storytelling
    A hand-crafted retro art style paired with dramatic cutscenes and a moody soundtrack.
